message:
fix(hedge): prevent Sleep polled-after-completion panic when service poll_ready is Pending

HedgeFuture stored delay_elapsed as a local variable, causing
poll_with_time to be called on a completed Sleep if the hedge service
returned Pending from poll_ready after the timer elapsed. Sleep asserts
on poll-after-completion, so this panicked.

Fix: promote delay_elapsed to a field in HedgeFutureState::Running so
the elapsed flag persists across re-polls. The sleep is only polled
while the flag is false.

Regression test uses an isolated AtomicU64 time source to avoid races
with other tests sharing the module-level TEST_NOW static.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
